description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a long cylindrical barrel and a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it. The receiver is equipped with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the fore-end appears ribbed for improved grip. The stock is a skeletonized, adjustable folding type with a pronounced pistol grip, designed for ergonomic handling and compact storage. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall design emphasizes durability and functionality, suitable for urban law enforcement or tactical scenarios.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a ribbed fore-end, Picatinny rail, and a skeletonized folding stock with pistol grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, ribbed fore-end, Picatinny rail, and skeletonized folding stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the tubular magazine beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock and receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the folding stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath and visible ribbing on the fore-end
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth contours and no finger grooves
